name: IdsDmClmDmInitClmExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, LTRIM(RTRIM(CLM_ID)) AS CLM_ID, CLM_FINL_DISP_CD, CLM_STTUS_CD, CLM_TRNSMSN_STTUS_CD, CLM_TYP_CD, CLM_REMIT_HIST_SUPRES_EOB_IN, CLM_REMIT_HIST_SUPRES_REMIT_IN, CMPL_MBRSH_IN, CLM_RCVD_DT, CLM_SRCH_DT, CLM_SVC_STRT_DT, CLM_SVC_END_DT, MBR_BRTH_DT, CLM_CHRG_AMT, CLM_PAYBL_AMT, CLM_REMIT_HIST_CNSD_CHRG_AMT, CLM_REMIT_HIST_NO_RESP_AMT, CLM_REMIT_HIST_PATN_RESP_AMT, ALPHA_PFX_SUB_ID, CLM_SUB_ID, CMN_PRCT_PRSCRB_CMN_PRCT_ID, GRP_UNIQ_KEY, GRP_ID, GRP_NM, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_FIRST_NM, MBR_MIDINIT, MBR_LAST_NM, PROV_BILL_SVC_ID, PROV_PD_PROV_ID, PROV_PCP_PROV_ID, PROV_REL_GRP_PROV_ID, PROV_REL_IPA_PROV_ID, PROV_SVC_PROV_ID, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN PCA_TYP_CD IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN PCA_TYP_CD = 'NA' THEN NULL WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(PCA_TYP_CD)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE PCA_TYP_CD END AS PCA_TYP_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_CLM_INIT ) SELECT * FROM cte
